creator: johannes.kunde@gmail.com
text:
> or iocage has some strange problems or something in your configuration is wrong

This must be it.
I've already tested with a fresh iocage-installation a few weeks ago (without success), so now, after your hint I set up another fresh installation but used BastilleBSD this time (I'm not familiar with CBSD and don't want to learn a third Jail-Framework). The Bastille Jail now starts without any issues whatsoever. I am not sure if it has to do with iocage alone or if it is the combination of my hardware (amd64 with Intel Xeon CPU, 128GB RAM, ...) and iocage, but anyway, I think there is no general issue. Sorry for the noise, and thank you very much for your help!
